note: Created tests/ffi_valid_path_error_codes.rs with 13 new tests (19 total including harness smoke tests): valid config returns positive handle, valid handle is usable, empty/null config returns ERR_INVALID_CONFIG, all 5 FFI functions (connect/send/recv/close/device_free) with invalid handles (0, MAX, 999999) return ERR_INVALID_HANDLE, and 4 wg_last_error tests verifying meaningful error strings after various failures. All tests pass.
